narrative:
Washington Twp township has 4,887 registered voters, with 47.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.2 percentage points.
